name: rehab/pillars
title: Pillars (3-up)
description: 3-up pillar grid with icon + numbered eyebrow + heading + body. Used for 'Why us' / 'Three reasons' sections.

subheading.default: Discreet, doctor-led and deeply personal — every aspect of our program is designed for sustainable, long-term sobriety.

default.title: Eastern and Western therapy, combined
default.body: Our highly experienced clinicians use a combination of Eastern and Western therapeutic techniques.

default.title: A program shaped to your condition
default.body: There's no silver bullet — we provide fully customised programs based on a clinical assessment.

default.title: Available 24/7 — when cravings hit hardest
default.body: Our clinical team is fully committed to providing the support, expertise and guidance required.
